ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_eSolutions", ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Status__c,"Processed"), ISCHANGED(SBQQ__Status__c), NOT($User.NATT_Lynx_Fleet__c), NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Admin')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to change the status to processed.
